violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth found on top of the flour storage bin. Wet wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. In-use scoop used for whipped cream was found stored on a plate in the restaurant kitchen. In-use serving utensils should be stored in the items they are serving or ice bath between uses.--Ready to use bottle of Surface Cleaner Sanitizer RTU was found at 3010ppm lactic acid. This exceeds the recommended concentration level of 704-1875ppm.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Test strips were not available for the lactic acid solution used in the facility. Testing strips should be available to check the strength of sanitizers used in the facility.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. Water in the bakery dish machine was found dirty. Water should be changed more frequently.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Rug found in food storage area. Rugs area not allowed in food storage areas.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
